docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT STEUBEN, MAURICE J. AS TO RESPONDENT SMITH, DENISE MARIE HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
